summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mikon Insights OSS Business Intelligence platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend functionality working well with minor chart rendering issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart components showing width/height -1 warnings in console, suggesting responsive layout issues

integration_issues.issue: Logout button not easily discoverable - may be hidden in user menu

issues: Console warnings about NaN values being passed to React components

passed_tests: Dashboard KPIs loading (Independence Score: 200%, Total Revenue: €267,040)
Dashboard charts rendering (Revenue evolution, Expenses pie chart)
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Projects, Expenses, Services, ROI Simulator)
Dark theme with Mikon brand colors
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (16/16 tests passed), Frontend: 90% (minor UI issues only)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chart responsive layout issues causing width/height -1 warnings. Add more discoverable logout functionality. Address NaN values being passed to React components.
